summary: Matched a small batch of simple fighter and stage functions, mostly in Kirby initialization/collision code plus two route-stage helpers. The decomp.dev bot reported 6 new matches totaling +280 bytes and a +0.01% matched-code increase. The PR also tightened several header prototypes and added needed includes for newly used helpers.
what_changed: Implemented ftKb_AttackDashAir_Coll as a small collision wrapper calling ft_80082C74(gobj, fn_800F1FDC).
Implemented ftKb_SpecialAirNDrink_Coll as the same collision-wrapper pattern with ft_80082C74(gobj, fn_800F6F50).
Implemented fn_800FDCE0 with FORCE_PAD_STACK_8 followed by calls to ft_800892A0(gobj) and ft_80089824(gobj).

Reworked ftKb_SkSpecialAirNCancel_Coll into a matching version using FORCE_PAD_STACK_16, ft_80081D0C(gobj), and ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic(gobj) instead of the previous Fighter_ChangeMotionState/ftKirbyDmgInline path.
Added ftKb_Init.h prototypes for fn_800F1FDC, fn_800F6F50, and fn_800FDCE0.
Implemented grKinokoRoute fn_80208480 as a bool-returning helper that calls Ground_801C5740(arg) only when arg == 1, and updated its header prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to bool(bool).
Implemented grShrineRoute_8020882C as a one-call wrapper around grShrineRoute_802088C0(6), and refined grShrineRoute_802088C0's header prototype to take an int.
Added or reordered includes for helpers used by the new matches, including ftCo_Landing.h, ft_0881.h, ftwalkcommon.h, Kirby item headers, and gr/ground.h.
Applied clang-format-style wrapping to many long Fighter_ChangeMotionState and ftParts_8007487C call sites in ftKb_Init.c.
smart_moves: Recognized two Kirby collision functions as direct ft_80082C74 callback wrappers, reusing existing callback symbols rather than expanding unnecessary logic.
Used FORCE_PAD_STACK_8 and FORCE_PAD_STACK_16 where small functions needed exact stack shape for matching.

Converted UNKNOWN header signatures to narrower, evidence-backed prototypes only where the implementation made the parameter/return shape clear, such as bool fn_80208480(bool) and grShrineRoute_802088C0(int).
Pulled in concrete headers for new dependencies instead of relying on placeholder or transitive declarations.
Kept stage-route functions minimal: one conditional Ground_801C5740 call for KinokoRoute and one constant-dispatch call for ShrineRoute.
decomp_lessons: For simple collision-state functions, check for existing common transition helpers like ft_80082C74 that take a gobj plus callback; many easy matches may be one-line wrappers.

A previously plausible nonmatching implementation can be replaced by a much smaller canonical helper path; ftKb_SkSpecialAirNCancel_Coll matched by using ft_80081D0C and ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic rather than manual motion-state transition code.
Stack padding macros remain important even in tiny functions; the matched fn_800FDCE0 and ftKb_SkSpecialAirNCancel_Coll explicitly used FORCE_PAD_STACK_*.
When implementing route/stage helpers, narrow UNK_PARAMS prototypes as soon as the function body proves a concrete scalar argument type.
Formatting-only churn can accompany matching changes, but the functional matches were concentrated in a few small helpers reported by decomp.dev.
naming_conventions: Kirby fighter symbols keep the ftKb_ prefix, with copied-special names embedded in the function name, such as ftKb_SpecialAirNDrink_Coll and ftKb_SkSpecialAirNCancel_Coll.
Anonymous/internal helper symbols remain address-derived fn_######## when no semantic name is available, such as fn_800FDCE0, fn_800F1FDC, fn_800F6F50, and fn_80208480.
Stage route functions use the gr<Stage>Route_######## pattern, as in grKinokoRoute_8020836C and grShrineRoute_8020882C.
Header declarations retain address comments beside prototypes, e.g. /* 0FDCE0 */ void fn_800FDCE0(Fighter_GObj* gobj);
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use FORCE_PAD_STACK_8 in tiny sequential-call functions when normal C would otherwise omit needed stack padding.
Use FORCE_PAD_STACK_16 in collision functions when the matched assembly expects a larger frame despite simple control flow.
Express bool comparisons explicitly as arg == 1 when that is what matches, as in fn_80208480.

Prefer common engine helpers for collision/ground-air transitions: ft_80082C74 for callback-based collision handling, ft_80081D0C for ground/air status check, and ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic for landing transition.
Keep one-call wrappers simple; grShrineRoute_8020882C matched as only grShrineRoute_802088C0(6).
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.

The decomp.dev bot reported 6 new matches: ftKb_SkSpecialAirNCancel_Coll (+60), fn_800FDCE0 (+52), fn_80208480 (+52), ftKb_AttackDashAir_Coll (+40), ftKb_SpecialAirNDrink_Coll (+40), and grShrineRoute_8020882C (+36).
follow_up_queries: Find other ftKb_*_Coll functions that are only ft_80082C74(gobj, callback) wrappers.
Search for remaining UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations in grkinokoroute.h and grshrineroute.h that can be narrowed from simple call sites.
Look for other tiny fighter helper functions that need FORCE_PAD_STACK_8 or FORCE_PAD_STACK_16 to match.
Audit Kirby copied-special collision functions for cases where manual Fighter_ChangeMotionState code should actually be a common helper call.
